roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
SENTENCING TX FILED
ACCT SETUP IN CUBS,REFER RESTITUTION,FINES&FEES TO COLLECTIONS UNIT

/CAL: DA 1203,2PC MTN/CON: M SCHULMAN/MTR-DA-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:09-18-09/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ: 30 DAYS /ADDL CTS:4/SWAPD: 09-21-09/CTORD: BRASS KNUCKLES FOUND ON DEFT TO BE CONFISCATED AND DESTROYED/ /PROB EXT: 08-03-11/

/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ  1Y  /CTS:120   /DEF:MAY SERVE REMAINING TIME (8MONTHS) IN A DAILY OUTPATIENT PROGRAM APPROVED BY APD & THE COURT/X:IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLETE APPROVED PROGRAM (HAIGHT ASHBURY) HE IS TO SERVE 1YEAR IN COUNTY JAIL & WILL NOT RECEIVE ANY CREDITS FOR TIME SERVED IN PROGRAM/WS/X:WARRANTLESS SEARCH IS TO INCLUDE COMPUTERS & ANY ELECTRICAL DEVICES UNDER DEFENDANT'S CONTROL/DNA/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/DEF:IS ORDERED TO PAY RESTITUTION TO CITIBANK IN THE AMOUNT OF $16,300/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PROBATION DEPARTMENT IS NOT TO BANK THIS CASE/PROG:09-09-08/CONTD:PROGRESS, DAILY OUTPATIENT PROGRAM/DOP/BE/

/CAL:PROC RE BW STAY ON 6-18-08 & DISPOSITION/BWSTAY:06-18-08/BFSA:06-18-08/X:CONSENT OF REINSTATEMENT OF BAIL FILED IN OPEN COURT,/MO GRTD/CTORD:BOND REINSTATED/BAIL:50,000/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENTPLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:   3/DISM3/X:HARVEY WAIVERS AS TO 2331330 & 2304030/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 08-04-08/TWS/

/CAL TO RESET OR DISPO/TEXT BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X  NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO06-26-08,/X: BAIL SET AT $100,000/BWSCBF/CONTD:BW STAY & DISPOSITION/DOPC/
